data.html:
using System;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Microsoft.AspNet.SignalR;
using Microsoft.AspNet.SignalR.Hubs;

namespace AttendanceSystem.Hubs
{
    /// 
    /// SignalR hub that pushes real-time attendance events to connected
    /// dashboard clients. The Python device service POSTs records to the
    /// /api/attendance/sync endpoint, which then broadcasts to all clients
    /// subscribed to this hub.
    ///
    /// Client-side events (JavaScript):
    ///   - attendanceRecorded  : fired on each individual check-in/out
    ///   - recordsSynced       : fired when a batch sync completes
    ///   - deviceStatusChanged : fired when device status updates
    /// 
    public class AttendanceHub : Hub
    {
        private static int _connectedClients = 0;

        public override Task OnConnected()
        {
            _connectedClients++;
            Clients.All.clientCountChanged(_connectedClients);
            return base.OnConnected();
        }

        public override Task OnDisconnected(bool stopCalled)
        {
            if (_connectedClients > 0) _connectedClients--;
            Clients.All.clientCountChanged(_connectedClients);
            return base.OnDisconnected(stopCalled);
        }

        /// 
        /// Allows clients to join a device-specific group so they only
        /// receive events for a particular device serial number.
        /// 
        [HubMethodName("SubscribeToDevice")]
        public Task SubscribeToDevice(string deviceSerial)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(deviceSerial))
                throw new ArgumentException("Device serial required");
            return Groups.Add(Context.ConnectionId, $"device-{deviceSerial}");
        }

        [HubMethodName("UnsubscribeFromDevice")]
        public Task UnsubscribeFromDevice(string deviceSerial)
            => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(deviceSerial)
                ? Task.CompletedTask
                : Groups.Remove(Context.ConnectionId, $"device-{deviceSerial}");
    }
}
